fields.description:
## Why
Every prompt/criterion change must be eval-gated, not vibes; and the gate currently cannot catch silent
descoping of an externally-expressed requirement.

## What
- A standing per-criterion eval set (recall / false-accept / false-fire) in the workflow-engine eval seam
  — NOW SHIPPED: Inspect-AI (`src/rebar/llm/eval.py`, `.rebar/evals/<id>.eval.yaml` specs, CI-gated) from epic `e6d9` —
  drawn from DSO (read-only) + snap-oakhart-manual + rebar's own tickets — for the NEW plan-review prompts.
- CONSUME the intent-source-fidelity (ISF) criterion BUILT in child `681b` (fire-acid-peer) — this child does
  NOT re-build it; it ADDS ISF's eval cases (recall + false-fire) to the standing suite and wires ISF into the
  eval gate. Ownership split: `681b` owns the ISF criterion + prompt + session-log gating; `7284` owns the eval
  suite/harness + its labeled cases (see the `relates_to` link).

## Scope
- SEED with REAL observed false-fires: docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/eval/observed-false-positives.md
  (FPs the gate produced on its OWN epic: T5c domain-inappropriate/speculative/wrong-threat-model, G6
  debatable-misinterpretation, T5a low-impact-nitpick). These are NOT the only FP modes — cover the whole
  taxonomy in that file (over-reading-ambiguity, stale-snapshot, already-mitigated, fabrication) AND the
  inverse sycophancy-induced false-NEGATIVE axis. Calibrate Pass-2/Pass-3 + prompts to suppress FPs WITHOUT
  trading them for false negatives.
- Lives in the SHIPPED prompt library (da27 front-matter prompts, `src/rebar/llm/prompts.py`) + the SHIPPED Inspect-AI eval seam (e6d9); the one-shot E1/E4 experiments seed it (docs/experiments is reference).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Per-criterion eval set with the three case types, drawn from all three corpuses; prompt changes eval-gated.
- [ ] ISF's eval cases (recall + false-fire) in the suite, gating ISF prompt changes — the ISF criterion itself is built + registry-wired in `681b`, not duplicated here.
- [ ] DSO stays read-only.

## Acceptance Criteria (added)
- [ ] The eval suite validates ISF (recall + false-fire) and tracks the observed-FP taxonomy (see eval/observed-false-positives.md) as labeled false-fires.
- [ ] A T12 RECALL fixture: a plan that genuinely changes a DEPLOYED system's runtime behavior with NO staged-rollout/rollback path SHOULD fire T12 — so T12 is validated for DISCRIMINATION, not only the suppression (not-applicable on libraries/CLIs) its calibration history covers.
- [ ] Labeling (RESOLVED, no longer open): auto-labels (closed tickets + completion-verification verdicts) seed the corpus for breadth; the GATING gold subset is HUMAN-ADJUDICATED.
